name: Scallion Pancakes #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Place flour and salt in a large mixing bowl.
2. Gradually pour in boiling water, stirring with a wooden spoon to mix.
3. When cool enough to handle, knead the dough with your hands for about 10 minutes until it is elastic.
4. Place the dough in a bowl and cover with a damp dish towel for 30 minutes.
5. Roll the dough out to a rectangular shape approximately 1/4 x 10 x 15 inches.
6. Brush the top lightly with peanut oil and sprinkle scallions over the entire surface of the dough.
7. Starting from one end, roll up the dough as you would a carpet.
8. Cut the roll into 6 thick slices.
9. Flatten each slice slightly with your hand.
10. Roll out each piece, turning it to keep it circular, until it is 1/4 inch thick and about 6 inches in diameter.
11. Keep the finished pancakes covered with a damp towel while you are working.
12. Heat skillet over high heat and pour in oil to a depth of about 1/4 inch.
13. When the oil is hot, turn the heat to medium-low.
14. Cook the pancakes one at a time, about 30 seconds on each side, until they are golden in color.
15. Cut into wedges and serve warm. Pancakes may be reheated in the oven before serving.
